changes: Added dynamic font customization with Google Fonts.
Updated date-time picker to a unified flow.
Added tag autocomplete for People and Topics in the editor.
Added settings to disable Markdown and select Map Theme.
Fully redesigned settings screens and layout.
Fixed status bar contrast in full-screen dialogs.
Added screen privacy settings to prevent screenshots.
Added a dedicated reminders manager.
Added a global network toggle to disable internet.
Added 12h/24h time format and start of week options.
Added long-press shortcut for journal options sheet.
Added setting to auto-include time in new entries.
Fixed tag sync by using unique names instead of IDs.
Improved background synchronization reliability.
Added Cloud Sync using WebDAV.
Added a Bin system for soft-deleted journals.
Added markdown links support in the editor.
Fixed chronological sorting of journal entries.
Fixed formatting loss issues when saving.
Added rich text formatting in the editor.
Fixed soft keyboard padding issues.
Fixed timeline filter to exclude draft entries.
Fixed save button visibility issues in the editor.
Removed toggle mode; journal screen is now always editable.
Added dynamic colors in music player matching album art.
Added timeline metadata badges for media, tags, and location.
Improved search screen navigation and empty states.
Fixed database cleanup to automatically purge unused tags.
Fixed database migration crashes from older versions.
Ensured old journal data remains intact during updates.
Added Spaces, People (@), and Topics (#) tagging.
Added smart autocomplete for tag inputs.
Added advanced search filtering for tags.
Added automatic merging when renaming tags.
Fixed video rendering boundaries in the grid.
Disabled inline video playback temporarily.
Added secure independent PIN lock option.
Refined settings screens layout.
Switched to MapLibre and MapTiler for vector maps.
Updated date picker with timeline month navigation.
Split downloads by architecture to reduce size.
Initial beta release of June.
